practice.name: Problem 8 (2013 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2013 AIME II problem focusing on complex numbers and roots of unity. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2013_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_8).

practice.name: Problem 4 (2018 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2018 AIME II problem focusing on polar form of complex numbers. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2018_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_4).
